transformation_rule: Use customer_id after duplicate-resolution rule.
Concatenate first and last name with space.
Lowercase; flag missing as DQ issue; do not fabricate.
Map USA, US, United States to USA.
Map full state names to two-letter code where possible.
Preserve source tier after resolving duplicate customer rows.
Preserve product_id.
Preserve product name.
Preserve category.
Cast to decimal.
Preserve order_id after dedup.
Foreign key to dim_customer; invalid IDs go to exception report.
Foreign key to dim_product; invalid IDs go to exception report.
Parse mixed timestamp formats; normalize to date.
Cast to integer; quantity must be greater than zero for completed orders.
Cast to decimal and compare to quantity * unit_price.
Preserve payment_id.
Foreign key to fact_order; orphan payments go to exception report.
Cast to decimal; compare settled amount to completed order total.
Foreign key to dim_customer where possible.
Preserve source category.
Preserve source sentiment.
